attributes.title: GeoIP — Geo-Attributed Source Events
attributes.description: Count of events whose source IP resolved to a country (public IPs only; LAN/private IPs are not geo-attributed). MITRE TA0043/T1590 Gather Victim Network Information.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Geo-Attributed Source Events", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Unique Source Countries
attributes.description: Distinct source countries observed (cardinality source.geo.country_name). MITRE TA0043/T1590.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Unique Source Countries", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.geo.country_name"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 48}}}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Geo Events Over Time by Module
attributes.description: Geo-attributed event volume over time split by event.module (pfsense/suricata/zeek). MITRE TA0043/T1590, TA0011/T1071.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Geo Events Over Time by Module", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "event.module", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 8, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Event Count"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "Count", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {"show": false}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Top Source Countries
attributes.description: External source countries by event volume, split by module. MITRE TA0043/T1590 Reconnaissance, TA0011/T1071 C2. False positives: CDN/cloud regions (US/IE/DE) appear heavily from legitimate egress — focus on blocked/alert events.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Top Source Countries", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.geo.country_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "event.module", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 4, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Source Country over Time (Heat Map)
attributes.description: Heat map of source country over time — a bright row is a country with a burst of activity (scanning campaign / coordinated source). MITRE TA0043/T1590, TA0001 Initial Access. False positives: cloud/CDN home countries dominate benign egress.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Source Country over Time (Heat Map)", "type": "heatmap", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "source.geo.country_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "missingBucket": false}}], "params": {"type": "heatmap", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "enableHover": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "colorsNumber": 5, "colorSchema": "Reds", "setColorRange": false, "colorsRange": [], "invertColors": false, "percentageMode": false, "valueAxes": [{"show": false, "id": "ValueAxis-1", "type": "value", "scale": {"type": "linear", "defaultYExtents": false}, "labels": {"show": false, "rotate": 0, "overwriteColor": false, "color": "black"}}]}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Source Countries (Tag Cloud)
attributes.description: Tag cloud of source countries; word size scales with event count. MITRE TA0043/T1590.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Source Countries (Tag Cloud)", "type": "tagcloud", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "source.geo.country_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 40, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"scale": "linear", "orientation": "single", "minFontSize": 14, "maxFontSize": 60, "showLabel": true}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Top Source ASNs
attributes.description: Source autonomous systems (source.as.organization.name + number) — attributes traffic to hosting/ISP networks. MITRE TA0011/T1071, TA0043/T1590. False positives: major clouds (Google/Amazon/Microsoft/Cloudflare) appear from legitimate services.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Top Source ASNs", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.as.organization.name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.as.number", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 1, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Top Destination Countries
attributes.description: Destination countries for outbound connections (destination.geo.country_name). MITRE TA0010 Exfiltration / T1048, TA0011 C2. False positives: CDN/cloud destinations dominate — unusual destinations are the signal.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Top Destination Countries", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "destination.geo.country_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 12, "otherBucket": true, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Top Source Cities
attributes.description: Top source cities (source.geo.city_name × country). MITRE TA0043/T1590.
attributes.visState: {"title": "GeoIP \u2014 Top Source Cities", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.geo.city_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.geo.country_name", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 2, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"perPage": 15, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": true, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": "", "showToolbar": true}}

attributes.title: GeoIP — Threat-Origin Log (Discover)
attributes.description: Geo-attributed events: source IP/country/ASN, destination, module, action. MITRE TA0043/T1590 Reconnaissance, TA0011/T1071 C2. False positives: legitimate cloud/CDN egress dominates; pivot on event.action:block / event.kind:alert.

attributes.title: SURU — GeoIP Threat Origins
attributes.description: Cross-source GeoIP/ASN attribution of external source IPs across firewall, Suricata, and Zeek (suru-* where source.geo exists). MITRE: TA0043 Reconnaissance (T1590 Gather Victim Network Information), TA0011 Command and Control (T1071 Application Layer Protocol), TA0001 Initial Access. Only public IPs are geo-attributed — LAN/private traffic is intentionally absent. False positives: CDN/cloud home countries and ASNs (US/IE/DE; Google/Amazon/Cloudflare) dominate benign egress — pivot on event.action:block / event.kind:alert to isolate hostile origins.
